name: Block malicious source IP 10.10.10.10 on Lab Firewall
description: Reference solution for UML Sub Case 2d: blocks the attacker test IP on the Lab Firewall via nftables.

action--block-ip.name: Block source IP on the Lab Target Service (nftables input)
action--block-ip.description: Drop all inbound traffic to the target from the malicious source IP.

commands.command: sudo nft add rule inet filter input ip saddr 10.10.10.10 counter drop
